scope: Additional technical terms encountered in translation installment 04 (Surat al-Nisa').

terms.english: the last occurrence; the final place
terms.note: A qualifier used to distinguish one repeated word or phrase from earlier occurrences in the same surah.
An exegetical clarification identifying the antecedent of a pronoun or demonstrative in the poem.

terms.english: so as to exclude; by way of excluding
terms.note: A technical explanatory formula used to show that a qualifier has been added in order to prevent confusion with other occurrences.
